titleStmt.title: SII 9.410: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 410. (A.R. No. 27 of 1917.) ON A PILLAR SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE MAIN SHRINE OF THE SIVA TEMPLE AT KOTTASIVARAM, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 12[87], Viśvāvasu, Kārtika, śu. 10, Śu[kravāra], corresponding to A.D. 1365 October 24 Friday, in the reign of Bukkaṇa-Voḍeya, ruling at Hosapaṭṭaṇa. It records that Būcheya-Nāyaka, son of Benakeya-Nāyaka, who was ruling at Sivara, the chief town of Nidugalla-rājya, made a gift of the village Gōpasamudra for the service of the god Gōpinathadēva and placed it in charge of Rāmakṛishṇadāsa and Kēśavadāsi, sons of Śivadāsi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē . trailō
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīmanumahā
maṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ Arirāyavi
bāḍu bhāṣegetapuvarāya
ragaṁḍa catusamudrādhipati
śrīvīrabukkaṇavoḍeyaru ho
sapaṭṭaṇadalu prithvīrājyaṁgeyi
Utire . śakavarṣa 1287 ne viśvā
vasusaṁvatsarada kārtika su 10 su
śrīmatu Abhaṁgagaruḍanārāyaṇa
vēdamārgapratiṣṭācārya veṁnakū
ra
rāmarasu
ḍa benakeyanāyakara kumā
ra būceyanāyakaru niḍu
galla rājyake mukhyavaha siva
rada paṭṭaṇadalu sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeI

valli dharmārthavā
ya sivarada
ya baḍagaṇa
gōpasamudrava
nu hiriyagrahā
rada gōpināthadēvara
śrīkāryyāṁgaraṁga
bhōgakke sātātmika
kke sivadāsigaḷa ma
kkaḷu varada rāmakriṣṇa
dāsarige kēsava
dāsige
ge dhārāpūrvvakavā
gi koṭṭaru . svadattaṁ
paradattāṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*]
ṣaṣṭhivarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ .
Ī dharmamācaṁ
drārukaṁnabara naḍe
suvevu maṁgaḷa ma
hāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.410 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
